# rootNode

**Instance Property**

The SpriteKit scene managed by this [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKScene] object.

## Declaration

```swift
var rootNode: (any GKSceneRootNodeType)? { get set }
```

## Discussion

The [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKSceneRootNodeType] protocol is an indirect type for game scene classes that the [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKScene] class can load. [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/SpriteKit/SKScene] is the only class currently supported for loading with the [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKScene] class.
title: rootNode
